docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY FINKELMAN, GLEB AS TO DEFENDANT BARRAGAN TRANSMISSION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-06-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARRAGAN TRANSMISSION
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT. NOTICE RE CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS "DENIED". COPY OF THE SAME MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
